scripts.catalog:fixtures: uv run --project apps/api python -m itam_planner_api.cli ingest-fixtures --fixtures-root apps/api/tests/fixtures --public-data-root public-data
scripts.catalog:live: uv run --project apps/api python -m itam_planner_api.cli ingest-live --public-data-root public-data
scripts.ci:api: uv sync --project apps/api --group dev && turbo run lint typecheck test:coverage --filter=@itam-planner/api && pnpm verify:api:fixtures
scripts.ci:hosted: pnpm ci:repo && pnpm ci:api && pnpm ci:web:full && pnpm coverage:merge
scripts.ci:local: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm ci:repo && pnpm ci:api && pnpm ci:local:web && pnpm coverage:merge
scripts.ci:repo: pnpm lint:repo && pnpm test:repo && pnpm check:magic-literals
scripts.ci:web:full: turbo run lint test:coverage typecheck --filter=@itam-planner/web && turbo run build --filter=@itam-planner/web
scripts.lint:repo:spelling: cspell lint --config cspell.jsonc --gitignore README.md CONTRIBUTING.md AGENTS.md docs/**/*.md apps/**/*.ts apps/**/*.tsx .github/**/*.yml .cursor/rules/*.mdc
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && turbo run build && pnpm verify:api:fixtures
